headline: Is BAE Systems (LSE:BA.) Still A Bargain After Its 324% Run?
summary: After a very large 323.8% return over the last 5 years, BAE Systems now trades at a point where both the Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) intrinsic value estimate and earnings multiples indicate the stock may still be pricing in some upside rather than a clear premium. That 323.8% five year return is the key backdrop, as it leaves current holders weighing how much of BAE Systems' story is already reflected in the share price. The recent collaboration with Vantor on next generation imaging...
